title: fix(i18n): translate Chinese placeholders to native languages
body:
## Summary

Translate 61 i18n files that were verbatim copies of zh-CN.json to their correct target languages.

- Each file was individually translated to ensure accurate native-language translations
- Covers all UI sections: nav, generate, history, library, network, reader, and modal
- Languages translated: Amharic, Bengali, Persian, Georgian, Kannada, Konkani, Latin, Maithili, Malayalam, Marathi, Malay, Burmese, Nepali, Odia, Punjabi, Pashto, Sindhi, Sinhala, Swahili, Tamil, Telugu, Urdu, Vietnamese
- Also fixed vi.json which had partial Chinese text in the network section
head: i18n
